According to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', the Battle of Boz Pity is set in [[20 BBY/Legends|19.43 BBY]].</ref> and [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]<ref name="Chronology note 2">[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 5|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume'' 5]] dates its stories, including "[[Bailed Out]]," to just before and during the events of [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].</ref> (31 to 36 [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]])<ref name="Chronology note 1" /><ref name="Chronology note 2" />

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a '''battle''' took place on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Qalydon/Legends|Qalydon]].

==History==
During the battle, [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]] visited the [[Qalydon/Legends|Qalydon]] frontlines, accompanied by his guards, which included [[Pello Scrambas]].<ref name="DB" />
